protein_name: Belongs to the SBNO family. 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: inflammatory response; negative regulation of canonical NF-kappaB signal transduction; negative regulation of MAPK cascade; negative regulation of neuroinflammatory response; positive regulation of canonical Wnt signaling pathway; positive regulation of neural precursor cell proliferation; positive regulation of signal transduction; regulation of DNA-templated transcription; Wnt signaling pathway
